title: La Dolores
writer: Josep Feliú i Codina, Florián Rey
actors: Concha Piquer, Manuel Luna, Ricardo Merino
plot: Dolores works at an Aragonese tavern and flirts with the village barber. After a quarrel she leaves, meets Lázaro and a new job. A rich farmer goes after her but she falls for Lázaro.The rejected barber runs a scornful song to dis...
